## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm type-check`, and tests pass locally
- [ ] New data fetches go through a typed service (no inline axios, no `any`)
- [ ] Client boundaries kept small; lists paginated/virtualized where they can grow
- [ ] Semantic theme tokens (works in light **and** dark)
- [ ] Long/streaming calls have timeout + abort
- [ ] Screenshots for UI changes
